git--git-foundations--draft.title: Git Foundations
git--git-foundations--draft.description: A beginner Git course with three standard modules and one final capstone. Learners work locally first, moving from an ordinary folder to a readable repository history without introducing branches, remotes, GitHub, or advanced history rewriting.
git--git-foundations--draft.moreComingSoon: More Git Foundations lessons are coming soon.

git-foundations-module-1-start-tracking.title: Start Tracking a Project
git-foundations-module-1-start-tracking.description: Move from an ordinary folder to a repository whose current state Git can explain.
outcomes: Explain why version control is more reliable than duplicate final folders.
Distinguish the working tree, staging area, and commit history.
Configure a local Git identity and initialize a repository on main.
Use git status and git status --short to read tracked and untracked state.
why: Builds confidence with start tracking a project.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

git-foundations-module-2-meaningful-hist.title: Build Meaningful History
git-foundations-module-2-meaningful-hist.description: Turn related edits into focused commits that another developer can read and inspect.
outcomes: Use git diff to inspect unstaged changes.
Use git add and git diff --staged to prepare one focused snapshot.
Create cohesive commits with meaningful imperative messages.
Read history with git log --oneline and inspect a commit with git show.
why: Builds confidence with build meaningful history.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

git-foundations-module-3-manage-tracked-.title: Manage Tracked Files Safely
git-foundations-module-3-manage-tracked-.description: Keep a repository clean as files are renamed, removed, ignored, or restored.
outcomes: Read how tracked file modifications appear before and after staging.
Rename and remove tracked files with git mv and git rm.
Create and verify .gitignore rules for generated files.
Restore staged and unstaged mistakes safely.
why: Builds confidence with manage tracked files safely.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

git-foundations-module-4-final-capstone.title: Final Capstone
git-foundations-module-4-final-capstone.description: Build and hand off one complete local history for a neighborhood resource guide.
outcomes: Create a clean repository from an ordinary project folder.
Build four purposeful commits whose boundaries match the requested work.
Keep generated output ignored and obsolete files out of HEAD.
Verify the final history and clean working state before handoff.
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: A Project Needs a Memory
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn why version control matters, working tree, staging area, and history, configure and initialize a repository through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Working Tree, Staging Area, and History

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: Module Project
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn project: start the field notes repository through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Project: Start the Field Notes Repository

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: From Edits to Understandable Snapshots
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn inspect unstaged changes with git diff, stage intentionally, create focused commits through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Inspect Unstaged Changes with git diff
Read History with log and show

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: Module Project
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn project: build the community website history through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Project: Build the Community Website History

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: A Repository Changes Shape
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn modify and verify tracked files, rename and remove tracked files, ignore generated files through focused examples and practice.

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: Module Project
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn project: prepare a clean release snapshot through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Project: Prepare a Clean Release Snapshot

git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.title: Final Capstone
git--git-foundations--draft-git-foundati.description: Learn final capstone: neighborhood resource guide history through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Final Capstone: Neighborhood Resource Guide History
